sourceRefs: DRAFT — built to the unit-03 template (objectif pragmatique + Point Langue grammar + thematic lexicon + DELF-format comprehension), then self-audited before commit. Covers the three-layer past (imparfait/passé composé rappel + plus-que-parfait) and past participle agreement incl. pronominal verbs. Awaiting native-speaker review.

Progression blueprint: Alter Ego+ 3 (Hachette), Dossier 3 'J'apprends' (parler du passé: imparfait/passé composé révision, le plus-que-parfait, l'accord du participe passé; thème: parcours d'études, partir étudier à l'étranger). Content is original; the book is used only for scope/sequence, never copied.
